title: Tomas and the Shy Dragon
synopsis: When young Tomas discovers a scared little dragon hiding in his garden, he must overcome his own fear to help his new friend find the courage to fly home to Dragon Valley.

pages.text: Tomas loved playing in his backyard garden. He had dark curly hair and warm brown skin that glowed in the sunshine. One morning, he heard a sad little whimper coming from behind the big sunflowers. Tomas felt curious but a little scared too.

illustration.description: A cheerful Latino boy with dark curly hair and brown skin wearing a bright blue t-shirt and red shorts, standing in a colorful garden with tall yellow sunflowers. His expression shows curiosity mixed with concern. The background has green grass, purple flowers, and a sunny yellow sky with white puffy clouds.
illustration.alt: Tomas standing in his garden looking curious

pages.text: Behind the sunflowers, Tomas found a tiny purple dragon with sparkly scales. The dragon was crying big silver tears. 'I'm too scared to fly home,' sobbed the dragon. 'My wings feel too small!' Tomas felt sad for his new friend.

illustration.description: A small purple dragon with shimmery scales and tiny wings sitting among tall sunflower stems, with silver tears falling from its large round eyes. The dragon looks very sad and frightened. Tomas is kneeling nearby with a concerned, gentle expression, reaching out carefully.
illustration.alt: Tomas discovering a crying purple dragon behind sunflowers

pages.text: 'Don't be scared,' said Tomas gently. 'I'm Tomas. What's your name?' The dragon sniffled. 'I'm Luna. I got lost trying to fly to Dragon Valley, and now I'm too scared to try again!' Tomas felt brave and wanted to help Luna.

illustration.description: Tomas sitting cross-legged on the grass facing Luna the dragon, both at eye level. Luna looks a bit less sad but still worried, while Tomas has a warm, encouraging smile. The scene is framed by colorful garden flowers in reds, oranges, and yellows, creating a cozy, safe feeling.
illustration.alt: Tomas and Luna the dragon talking in the garden

pages.text: 'I have an idea!' said Tomas excitedly. 'Let's practice flying together! I'll run with you.' Luna looked nervous but hopeful. 'Will you really help me?' she asked. 'Yes!' said Tomas. 'Friends help friends be brave!'

illustration.description: Tomas standing with his arms spread wide like wings, demonstrating to Luna who is watching with growing excitement. Both characters look happy and determined. The garden setting shows a clear blue sky perfect for flying, with butterflies floating around them in bright colors.
illustration.alt: Tomas showing Luna how to spread wings

pages.text: Tomas ran through the garden with his arms out wide while Luna flapped her little wings beside him. At first, Luna could only hop. But then she flew a little bit! 'I did it!' Luna squeaked happily. Tomas felt proud and excited for his friend.

illustration.description: Tomas running joyfully with arms outstretched while Luna flies just above the ground next to him, her wings spread and a huge smile on her face. They're moving through the garden with motion lines showing movement. The scene is filled with bright energy and happiness.
illustration.alt: Tomas and Luna practicing flying together

pages.text: Soon Luna was flying high above the garden! 'Thank you, Tomas!' she called down. 'You helped me feel brave!' Luna flew in happy circles before heading toward Dragon Valley. Tomas waved goodbye, feeling proud that he helped his friend. He couldn't wait to play in the garden again tomorrow!

illustration.description: Luna soaring confidently through a bright blue sky with white clouds, looking joyful and free. Below, Tomas waves enthusiastically from his colorful garden. The scene shows the contrast between Luna now flying high and confident versus her earlier scared state. Rainbow colors fill the sky showing the magical, happy ending.
illustration.alt: Luna flying away confidently while Tomas waves goodbye

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Luna the dragon feel at the beginning?
questions.explanation: Luna was scared and crying because she was too frightened to fly home.

questions.question: Where did Tomas find Luna?
questions.explanation: Tomas found Luna hiding behind the big sunflowers in his garden.

questions.question: How did Tomas help Luna?
questions.explanation: Tomas helped Luna by running with her and practicing flying together until she felt brave.

questions.question: How did Luna feel at the end?
questions.explanation: At the end, Luna felt happy and brave because she could fly confidently to Dragon Valley.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.text: Tomas found a little _____ hiding behind the sunflowers. The dragon was _____ and couldn't fly home.

pages.title: What Happened Next?
pages.text: Tomas wanted to help Luna feel _____. They practiced _____ together in the garden until Luna could fly to Dragon Valley.
